name: French Breakfast Muffins
recipeInstructions: Preheat the oven to 350°F. Grease 15 muffin cups (depending on the size of your muffin tins). In a bowl, mix together the shortening and sugar with the egg until well combined. Gradually stir in flour, baking powder, salt, and nutmeg alternately with milk. Fill each muffin cup about two-thirds full. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes. In another bowl, mix 1/2 cup sugar with cinnamon. After removing from the oven, roll the muffins in melted butter and then coat them in the cinnamon-sugar mixture. This recipe is a favorite of my daughter, Dawn. I found this recipe in the Betty Crocker Cookbook.
